scripts.install:all: npm install && concurrently --names UI,API --prefix-colors cyan,green "cd UI && npm install" "cd API && go mod download"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names UI,API --prefix-colors cyan,green "cd UI && npm run dev" "cd API && go run ./cmd/server"
scripts.test: concurrently --names UI,API "cd UI && npm test" "cd API && go test ./..."
